prompt: Add a name input form to a ZIO HTTP app where the user types their name and clicks Submit to get a personalized greeting without a page reload, using Datastar.

assertions.text: Uses event { handler { ... } } wrapper (not events) for single-shot response
Handler returns DatastarEvent.patchElements(...) directly (not a ZIO effect)
Uses dataOn.submit attribute for form submission without page reload
Includes datastarScript in the HTML head
Reads form input (name) from request and personalizes the greeting
Serves the initial HTML page (with form visible initially, greeting hidden until submitted)
